teammates.name: agent-store
teammates.focus: Three store improvements: (1) Add SQLite performance pragmas to initDB. (2) Add skipIfUnchanged to saveInner — skip update when content_hash matches. (3) Add TTL eviction sweep method. Add tests for all three.

teammates.name: agent-github
teammates.focus: Build a GitHub Issues adapter: loadFromGitHubIssues() that fetches issues via GitHub REST API and maps them to IngestDocuments. Add GitHub-specific derivers. Add types. Add tests.
